title: Real-Time Physics Engine
description: A full 2D physics simulation engine with uniform grid spatial hashing for O(n) collision detection (vs naive O(n²)), support for N-body particle dynamics with multiple integrators (Euler, Verlet), force fields (radial, vortex, constant), Hooke's law springs, Coulomb electrostatics, and impulse-based collision response with restitution and friction. Includes 500-particle stress test achieving 65+ FPS.
